metadata.description: Product fluency certification for sellers engaging manager-level buyers. Know the compliance dashboards, fraud flags, user controls, and reporting tools your prospects use daily — so you can speak their language, handle technical objections, and sell to F&I directors and compliance officers with credibility.
metadata.target_audience: Sales representatives selling to dealership managers

modules.title: Manager Platform Overview
modules.description: Informativ goals, compliance framework, core values, fraud prevention capabilities, and management oversight benefits.

questions.question: What is one of the main goals your Dealer Principal and GM have in implementing Informativ?

options.B: Simplify workflow and improve customer experience

questions.question: True or False: Informativ helps dealerships stay compliant with regulations like the FTC Safeguards Rule.
Which of the following is NOT one of the four core values supported by Informativ?
True or False: Soft pulls impact the customer’s credit score.
What benefit does digitizing compliance documents provide for desk managers?

options.C: Removes their ability to control the process

questions.question: When is the Informativ technology typically engaged?

options.C: After the driver’s license is scanned

questions.question: What happens when a new customer's driver's license is scanned into the system?

options.A: They are signed out of the system
options.C: Their info is sent to the CRM as a showroom visit

questions.question: True or False: Digital Deal Jackets may be created before the customer even visits the dealership.
What is the name used in the training exercise to practice scanning and storing documents?

modules.title: Prequalification & Soft Pulls (Manager)
modules.description: Soft pull benefits from management perspective, SSN requirements, real-time data, compliance officer role.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of using soft pulls during the prequalification process?

options.B: To replace the need for credit checks
options.C: To offer financing options without impacting credit

questions.question: True or False: A Social Security number is required to complete a soft pull.
When is the in-store prequalification process typically initiated?

options.B: When the customer signs the purchase order

questions.question: True or False: Soft pull data is displayed in real time in the Compliance Center dashboard.
Which mobile tool is used by the salesperson to initiate the prequalification?
True or False: The desk manager prepares the second pencil using the soft pull data.
What is the impact of soft pulls on the overall deal process?

options.B: Speeds it up and improves compliance
options.C: Removes the need for salesperson interaction

questions.question: True or False: Prequalification must always occur before the test drive.

modules.title: Compliance Center Dashboard
modules.description: Co-buyer indicators, red flags, fraud detection, hard pull requirements, and dashboard features.

questions.question: What does the Co-Buyer column indicate on the Compliance Center dashboard?

options.A: If the customer has a spouse
options.B: The number of credit pulls completed
options.C: If there are one or more co-buyers linked to the deal
options.D: If the customer has a trade-in vehicle

questions.question: True or False: A yellow row in the Compliance Center indicates a confirmed fraud detection.
What must be completed before a hard pull can be performed?

options.B: All compliance steps with no issues

questions.question: True or False: You can manually create a new customer if needed.
Which dashboard feature allows you to view deals submitted to Route One?
True or False: Managing dashboard columns changes the display for all users.
What should you do if 'Cannot Pull' appears in the Hard Pull column?

options.C: Review the dashboard for incomplete steps

questions.question: What action confirms a customer has moved from the shopping phase to the deal finalization phase?
True or False: The Compliance Center dashboard gives real-time visibility into showroom and website activity.

modules.title: Digital Deal Jacket Management
modules.description: Deal jacket functions, document storage, Activity Log, STIPs requests, and rate sheets.

questions.question: What is the main function of the Digital Deal Jacket?

options.B: Storing all customer documents and actions

questions.question: True or False: The Notes feature in the Digital Deal Jacket is only visible to salespeople.
Which tab contains scanned driver's licenses, proof of income, and compliance paperwork?
True or False: Driver's license scans appear in the License column after remote verification.
What action sends a request to a customer for additional documentation like proof of income?
True or False: The Run Credit Quick Qualify feature performs a hard pull.
Which of the following is only available if your dealership uses Dealertrack?
What happens after a remote license verification is completed?

options.A: The customer must return to the store
options.B: The system deletes the temporary record

questions.question: True or False: Customer actions help ensure compliance is completed before lender submission.

modules.title: Red Flags & OFAC Checks
modules.description: Red flag types, OFAC verification, document uploads, compliance documentation, and deal halting.

questions.question: What does the CBC Hide Bureau permission control?

options.B: The ability to clear red flags
options.C: Credit report visibility before compliance is complete

questions.question: True or False: Red flags are triggered by consistent and accurate customer information.
What document upload tool helps retain proof when clearing red flags?
True or False: The comments section within the credit report is the best place to document red flag resolutions.
What is the main purpose of an OFAC check?

options.B: To ensure a customer isn’t on the U.S. sanctions list

questions.question: True or False: You can ignore an OFAC warning if the customer is paying with cash.
What type of documents might be required to resolve an OFAC warning?
True or False: OFAC and red flag checks are always bundled into hard credit pulls.
How do desk managers benefit from clearing red flags and running OFAC checks?

options.B: They ensure regulatory compliance and fraud prevention
options.C: They avoid interacting with compliance officers

questions.question: True or False: You must halt the deal if an OFAC warning is encountered.

modules.title: STIPs & Lender Submission
modules.description: File completeness, document requests, system management, lender submission, and digital handling.

questions.question: Before submitting a customer to Route One or Dealertrack, what should you do first?

options.C: Review the customer file for completeness

questions.question: True or False: Proof of residence and proof of income must be uploaded before lender submission.
Which system allows you to digitally manage and store all STIP documents?
True or False: Once documents are uploaded by the customer, they must be manually scanned into the Digital Deal Jacket.
How can sales staff send step requests directly from their mobile devices?

options.C: Via Informativ mobile app or digital showroom

questions.question: True or False: Handling steps digitally increases the chance of losing important documents.
What happens when a lender requests additional documentation after the deal is submitted?

options.C: You upload the documents using Informativ Steps feature
options.D: You ask the customer to return to the dealership

questions.question: True or False: Digital document handling eliminates the need for physical storage of STIPs.

modules.title: Multi-Department Access & Permissions
modules.description: F&I access levels, read access, Admin Functions, document viewing, and digital workflows.

questions.question: What type of access should be granted to F&I and Accounting teams in the Compliance Center?
True or False: F&I must request paper documents from sales to complete their approvals.
Where can F&I view supporting materials like driver’s licenses and stips?

options.C: Documents tab in the Digital Deal Jacket

questions.question: True or False: Admins are responsible for assigning user access permissions in the Compliance Center.
Which function allows admins to set access permissions for roles like F&I, desk managers, and salespeople?
True or False: Documents reviewed in the Digital Deal Jacket cannot be filtered using advanced search.
What is the purpose of reviewing documents digitally instead of using paper files?

options.C: It streamlines communication and avoids paper requests
options.D: It enables commissions to be paid

questions.question: True or False: Admins can create user profiles for roles beyond F&I, like salespersons and managers.

modules.title: User Management & System Configuration
modules.description: User roles, IP restrictions, MFA, credit overrides, user tracking, and archived documents.

questions.question: Which user role typically has access to deal approvals, overrides, and full customer interaction visibility?
True or False: Internet Admins have full access to deal approvals and user management.
What action should be taken to add a new user in the Compliance Center?

options.A: Go to User Management and click 'Add New User'
options.B: Send an email to the helpdesk

questions.question: What configuration prevents a user from logging in outside of the dealership IP range?
True or False: MFA should be disabled for administrators to reduce login delays.
Why is 'Exclude Credit Scores' an important setting for Internet sales or customer service roles?

options.A: It prevents them from viewing OFAC results
options.B: It restricts access to sensitive credit information

questions.question: Which configuration setting prevents a user from changing the credit decision logic for a deal?
True or False: User history and activity logs remain accessible after a user is terminated.
What user configuration allows grouping users for reporting and deal flow tracking?
True or False: Only administrators can view archived documents for audit purposes.
